programme.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
programme.desc: Years before he becomes the tyrannical president of Panem, 18-year-old Coriolanus Snow remains the last hope for his fading lineage. With the 10th annual Hunger Games fast approaching, the young Snow becomes alarmed when he's assigned to mentor Lucy Gray Baird. Uniting their instincts for showmanship and political savvy, they race against time to ultimately reveal who's a songbird and who's a snak

programme.title: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Based on a true story, the film tells of the courageous men and women who risk their lives every working day, pitting their fishing boats and rescue vessels against the capricious forces of nature. Their worst fears are realized at sea on Halloween of 1991, when they are confronted by three raging weather fronts which unexpectedly collide to produce the greatest, fiercest storm in modern history -

programme.title: Parish
programme.desc: Cornered, Gray's allegiance to Horse is put to the ultimate test; the Parish and Tongai families search for their missing loved ones; the Tongais gather intel on their adversary.

programme.title: Parish
programme.desc: When Anton, an old colleague, learns Gray is working with the Tongans, he forces Gray to choose: his family or Horse; Rose and Makayla work together to survive; Horse searches for a traitor.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: After a heist in Venice, Steve turns on his partners in crime, killing safecracker John Bridger and keeping all the gold for himself; the rest of the team, including leader Charlie Croker, driver Handsome Rob, explosives man Left Ear and tech geek Lyle, vows revenge; they enlist the help of Bridger's daughter, Stella and plot to recover the gold from Steve's Los Angeles mansion.

programme.title: Live: TNA iMPACT!
programme.desc: Matches and storylines feature superstars battling for supremacy and championship gold within the ring.

programme.title: Shooter
programme.desc: A top Marine sniper, Bob Lee Swagger, leaves the military after a mission goes awry and disappears without a trace. Swagger is coaxed back into service after high-profile government officials convince him to help thwart a plot against the President of the United States. programme.title: Rock & Roll Road Trip With Sammy Hagar
programme.desc: Red Hot Chili Peppers/Chickenfoot drummer Chad Smith drops by Sammy's studio to catch up and perform new Chickenfoot songs with Joe Satriani and Sammy.

programme.title: Rock & Roll Road Trip With Sammy Hagar
programme.desc: Sammy Hagar visits with Vince Neil of Mötley Crüe at his home in Nashville, Tenn.; Sammy drops by Phoenix Studios to plug in and play some acoustic songs.

programme.title: The Big Interview With Dan Rather
programme.desc: Dan Rather sits down with three members of the progressive rock band Kansas 40 years after the release of their iconic song "Dust in the Wind.".

programme.title: The Big Interview With Dan Rather
programme.desc: The two surviving members of the Doors, John Densmore and Robby Krieger, reminisce about their music, the 60s, and the life and death of lead singer Jim Morrison.

programme.title: Pirate Radio
programme.desc: In 1966, BBC radio broadcasts less than an hour of pop music a day, forcing pirate DJs to take up the slack from boats anchored outside British waters. Quentin (Bill Nighy) is the commander of such a pirate station, overseeing a host of seedy, lusty and dope-smoking DJs, including the Count (Philip Seymour Hoffman) and Dave (Nick Frost), who makes it his personal mission to see to it that Quentin'

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: Armed with nothing but a hatful of dreams, young chocolatier Willy Wonka manages to change the world, one delectable bite at a time.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: Jaime Reyes suddenly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology called the Scarab. When the Scarab chooses Jaime to be its symbiotic host, he's bestowed with an incredible suit of armor that's capable of extraordinary and unpredictable powers, forever changing his destiny as he becomes the superhero Blue Beetle.

programme.title: Love, Simon
programme.desc: Everyone deserves a great love story, but for 17-year-old Simon Spier, it's a little more complicated. He hasn't told his family or friends that he's gay, and he doesn't know the identity of the anonymous classmate that he's fallen for online. Resolving both issues proves hilarious, terrifying and life-changing.

programme.title: Carol
programme.desc: Aspiring photographer Therese spots the beautiful, elegant Carol perusing the doll displays in a 1950s Manhattan department store. The two women develop a fast bond that becomes a love with complicated consequences.

programme.title: On Becoming a Guinea Fowl
programme.desc: On an empty road in the middle of the night, Shula stumbles across the body of her uncle. As the funeral unfolds, the cousins unveil the buried secrets of their Zambian family in a vibrant reckoning with the lies we tell ourselves.

programme.title: Won't Back Down
programme.desc: Jamie Fitzpatrick and Nona Alberts are two women from opposite sides of the social and economic track, but they have one thing in common: a mission to fix their community's broken school and ensure a bright future for their children. The two women refuse to let any obstacles stand in their way as they battle a bureaucracy that's hopelessly mired in traditional thinking, and they seek to re-energiz

programme.title: They All Laughed
programme.desc: The employees of New York City's Odyssey Detective Agency can't seem to prevent themselves from getting over-involved in their clients' lives. When aging gumshoe John Russo (Ben Gazzara) is assigned to trail an Italian millionaire's wife, Angela (Audrey Hepburn), he inevitably falls for her continental charm. His partner, Charles (John Ritter), is similarly unable to keep his hands off the woman h

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions unti

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: A Natural History
programme.desc: Delving into the mythological, including dragons, mermaids, and unicorns -- alongside examinations of natural world beasts, such as vervet monkeys, narwhals, and manatees; Stephen Fry travels far and wide to learn about such animals.

programme.title: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Minor-league baseball announcer Artie Decker (Billy Crystal) and his wife, Diane (Bette Midler), get to see their only child, Alice (Marisa Tomei), very seldom. To their surprise, Alice and her husband (Tom Everett Scott) ask them to watch their children so they can embark on a trip for work. It promises to be a fun time for all, until the three young ones turn out to be quite a handful for this o

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her n

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: In a series of interconnected stories, various Los Angeles residents (Jessica Alba, Jessica Biel, Bradley Cooper) wend their way through the highs and lows of love during a single day. As the holiday unfolds, they experience first dates, longtime commitments, youthful crushes and connections to old flames.

programme.title: Happy Death Day
programme.desc: Tree Gelbman is a blissfully self-centered collegian who wakes up on her birthday in the bed of a student named Carter. As the morning goes on, Tree gets the eerie feeling that she's experienced the events of this day before. When a masked killer suddenly takes her life in a brutal attack, she once again magically wakes up in Carter's dorm room unharmed. Now, the frightened young woman must relive

programme.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Some British retirees (Judi Dench, Maggie Smith, Bill Nighy) decide to outsource their retirement to exotic -- and less expensive -- India. Lured by advertisements for the newly restored Marigold Hotel and imagining a life of leisure in lush surroundings, they arrive and find that the Marigold is actually a shell of its former self. Though their new home is not quite what they had imagined, the re

programme.title: Dim Sum Funeral
programme.desc: In the wake of her death, the embittered children of Chinese-American matriarch Mrs. Xiao (Lisa Lu) begrudgingly return to their childhood home for a bristly -- and brief, they hope -- reunion. But after Xiao's maid and sole confidant, Viola (Talia Shire), reveals her wish to undergo a week-long Buddhist funeral rite, the younger Xiaos -- including plastic surgeon Alexander (Russell Wong) and lesb

programme.title: Bad Santa
programme.desc: In this dark comedy, the crotchety Willie T. Stokes (Billy Bob Thornton) and his partner (Tony Cox) reunite once a year for a holiday con. Posing as a mall Santa and his elf, they rip off shopping outlets on Christmas Eve. This year, however, Willie is falling apart. He's depressed and alcoholic, and his erratic behavior draws the suspicion of mall security (Bernie Mac). But when befriending a sma

programme.title: Bad Santa 2
programme.desc: Fueled by cheap whiskey, greed and hatred, Willie Soke (Billy Bob Thornton) teams up with his angry little sidekick, Marcus, to knock off a Chicago charity on Christmas Eve. Along for the ride is chubby and cheery Thurman Merman, a 250-pound ray of sunshine who brings out Willie's sliver of humanity. Mommy issues arise when the pair are joined by Willie's horror story of a mother, Sunny Soke, who

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: Leonard (Guy Pearce) is tracking down the man who raped and murdered his wife. The difficulty, however, of locating his wife's killer is compounded by the fact that he suffers from a rare, untreatable form of memory loss. Although he can recall details of life before his accident, Leonard cannot remember what happened fifteen minutes ago, where he's going, or why.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: While transporting a car from Chicago to San Diego, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) picks up a hitchhiker named John Ryder (Rutger Hauer), who claims to be a serial killer. After a daring escape, Jim hopes to never see Ryder again. But when he witnesses the hitchhiker murdering an entire family, Jim pursues Ryder with the help of truck-stop waitress Nash (Jennifer Jason Leigh), pitting the rivals ag

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: A U.S. newsman (Raymond Burr) in Tokyo recounts the story of a huge dinosaur roused from the sea by an atomic blast.

programme.title: Mothra vs. Godzilla
programme.desc: Japan comes under attack from two monsters in a giant monster battle between a rampaging Godzilla and the colossal genetically engineered moth called Mothra.

programme.title: Son of Godzilla
programme.desc: In this Japanese monster movie, the massive Godzilla comes to the aid of his newborn son, who hatches from an egg on a remote island where scientists are conducting experiments with radioactivity. Revealing a surprising paternal streak, Godzilla tries to teach his much smaller progeny how to use his powers. The father/son team must then battle giant insects, including praying mantises and a formid

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Hedorah
programme.desc: Godzilla fights pollution in the form of living sludge found by a scientist (Akira Yamauchi) and his son (Toshie Kimura).

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Megalon
programme.desc: Godzilla and flying cyborg Jet Jaguar meet a giant cockroach and a big black chicken sent by Seatopians.

programme.title: The Return of Godzilla
programme.desc: Okumura witnesses a huge monster during a storm. Biologist Hayashida hears Okumura's story from Toto Nippo reporter Maki and concludes that Godzilla, who was buried 30 years ago, has come back to life. Godzilla then appears in Tokyo Bay.

programme.title: The Last Emperor
programme.desc: This sweeping account of the life of Pu Yi (John Lone), the last emperor of China, follows the leader's tumultuous reign. After being captured by the Red Army as a war criminal in 1950, Pu Yi recalls his childhood from prison. He remembers his lavish youth in the Forbidden City, where he was afforded every luxury but unfortunately sheltered from the outside world and complex political situation su

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Texas border patrolmen (Kris Kristofferson, Treat Williams) find a jeep, a skeleton and $800,000 in cash dating from 1963.

programme.title: Pirate Radio
programme.desc: In 1966, BBC radio broadcasts less than an hour of pop music a day, forcing pirate DJs to take up the slack from boats anchored outside British waters. Quentin (Bill Nighy) is the commander of such a pirate station, overseeing a host of seedy, lusty and dope-smoking DJs, including the Count (Philip Seymour Hoffman) and Dave (Nick Frost), who makes it his personal mission to see to it that Quentin'

programme.title: It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: Superman: The Movie
programme.desc: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman)

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: Superman (Christopher Reeve) foils the plot of terrorists by hurtling their nuclear device into outer space, but the bomb's shock waves free the Kryptonian villain General Zod (Terence Stamp) and his henchmen Ursa (Sarah Douglas) and Non (Jack O'Halloran) from their imprisonment. Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his su

programme.title: Supergirl
programme.desc: Kara (Helen Slater) of Argo City poses as Clark Kent's cousin, Linda Lee, to recover the Omegahedron from a witch (Faye Dunaway).

programme.title: Nanny McPhee Returns
programme.desc: Enigmatic Nanny McPhee arrives on the doorstep of a harried mother, Isabel Green, who is trying to raise her kids and tend to the family farm while her husband is away at war. Isabel has her hands full of not only her own three, but also with her sister's spoiled pair. With no time to lose, McPhee uses magic to instill in the children five important lessons.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: While Lex Luthor plots to destroy him once and for all, the Man of Steel returns after a long absence to a much-changed world. Lois Lane has moved on with her life, and society has learned to survive without him. Superman must find a way to reconnect with her and find his place in a world that may no longer need him.

programme.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
programme.desc: The Green Lantern must race against time to stop Sinestro from unleashing a sinister plot.

programme.title: Green Lantern: Emerald Knights
programme.desc: New recruit Arisia (Elisabeth Moss) joins forces with Hal Jordan (Nathan Fillion) to save the universe from the forces of Krona.

programme.title: For All Mankind
programme.desc: Directed by Al Reinert and with music scored by Brian Eno, "For All Mankind" provides a testament to NASA's Apollo program of the 1960s and '70s. Composed of actual NASA footage of the missions and astronaut interviews, the documentary offers the viewpoint of the individuals who braved the remarkable journey to the moon and back. While compiling the material for the film, Reinert went through more

programme.title: Cleaner
programme.desc: Hoping to expose corruption, radical activists take 300 hostages at an energy company's annual gala in a high-rise building. Their cause soon gets hijacked by an extremist within their ranks who's ready to kill everyone. It's now up to a former soldier who works as a window cleaner to save the hostages trapped inside, including her younger brother.

programme.title: A Nightmare on Elm Street
programme.desc: Teenagers Nancy, Quentin, Kris, Jesse and Dean are all neighborhood friends who begin having the same dream of a horribly disfigured man who wears a tattered sweater and a glove made of knives. The man, Freddy Krueger (Jackie Earle Haley), terrorizes them in their dreams, and the only escape is to wake up. But when one of their number dies violently, the friends realize that what happens in the dr

programme.title: It
programme.desc: Seven young outcasts in Derry, Maine, are about to face their worst nightmare -- an ancient, shape-shifting evil that emerges from the sewer every 27 years to prey on the town's children. Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. Now adults, the childhood friends have long since gone their separate ways. But when people start disappearing, Mike Hanlon calls the others home for one final stand. Damaged by scars from the past, the united Losers must conquer their deepest fears to destroy

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: John Form (Ward Horton) thinks he's found the perfect gift for his expectant wife, Mia (Annabelle Wallis) : a vintage doll in a beautiful white dress. However, the couple's delight doesn't last long: One terrible night, devil worshippers invade their home and launch a violent attack against the couple. When the cultists try to summon a demon, they smear a bloody rune on the nursery wall and drip b

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: A man and his teenage daughter realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.

programme.title: 3 From Hell
programme.desc: Crazed killers Baby Firefly, Captain Spaulding and Otis Driftwood unleash bloody mayhem after escaping from prison.

programme.title: Time Bandits
programme.desc: Young history buff Kevin (Craig Warnock) can scarcely believe it when six dwarfs emerge from his closet one night. Former employees of the Supreme Being (Ralph Richardson), they've purloined a map charting all the holes in the fabric of time and are using it to steal treasures from different historical eras. Taking Kevin with them, they variously drop in on Napoleon (Ian Holm), Robin Hood (John Cl

programme.title: The Disaster Artist
programme.desc: The incredible true story of aspiring filmmaker and Hollywood outsider Tommy Wiseau as he and his best friend defiantly pursue their dreams and embark on the hilarious odyssey of making the now-infamous, cult classic "The Room.".

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Battle of the Realms
programme.desc: The heroes must travel to Outworld to defend Earthrealm as Scorpion searches for the ancient Kamidogu before it's used to resurrect the One Being.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Cage Match
programme.desc: Action superstar Johnny Cage squares off against a sinister secret society that's plotting a nefarious scheme. However, the brutal fight against the bloodthirsty warriors of the Netherrealm is just the beginning.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Scorpion's Revenge
programme.desc: The champions of Outworld and Earthrealm fight to the death in a brutal tournament that determines the fate of Earth.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Snow Blind
programme.desc: When Kano and Black Dragon mercenaries become determined to take over Earthrealm, undisciplined Kenshi seeks tutelage from retired Kuai Liang to stop Kano from decimating all of Earthrealm.

programme.title: The Hole in the Ground
programme.desc: One night, Sarah's young son disappears into the woods behind their rural home. When he returns, he looks the same, but his behavior grows increasingly disturbing. Sarah begins to believe that the boy who returned may not be her son at all.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Anyone who makes it out alive will get answers to the questions that the Gladers have been asking since they arrived in the maze.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After ratting out his Mafia cohorts, Giovanni Manzoni (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a French town. Despite the best efforts of their handler (Tommy Lee Jones) to keep them in line, Giovanni (now called Fred Blake), his wife (Michelle Pfeiffer) and children (Dianna Agron, John D'Leo) can't help but resort to doing things the "family" way. Howev

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: In the 1950s, notorious New York crime bosses Frank Costello and Vito Genovese vie for control of the city streets. Once the best of friends, petty jealousies and a series of betrayals place them on a deadly collision course that reshapes organized crime forever.

programme.title: Kiss of the Spider Woman
programme.desc: In a prison cell somewhere in Latin America, two very different men warily confront each other. Molina (William Hurt) is first seen wrapping his head in a towel, in the shape of a turban, while Valentin (Raul Julia), bearded and classically macho in appearance, watches with a mixture of fascination and revulsion. During the time spent together, the two men come to understand and respect each other

programme.title: Broken City
programme.desc: Former cop Billy Taggart (Mark Wahlberg) sees a chance at redemption for past sins when New York City's Mayor Nicolas Hostetler (Russell Crowe) calls on him for a special job. Hostetler thinks his wife, Cathleen (Catherine Zeta-Jones), is having an affair and that it may hurt his chances for re-election. However, a bigger scandal than expected pulls in Billy right at the start of his investigation

programme.title: Superman IV: The Quest for Peace
programme.desc: Seeing the United States and the Soviet Union engaged in a nuclear arms race that could lead to Earth's destruction, Superman (Christopher Reeve) decides that he must take action. He collects all the nuclear warheads from the world and throws them into space. Meanwhile, Superman's nemesis, Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), has broken out of prison with a new scheme. He clones Superman with radioactive ma

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: While Lex Luthor plots to destroy him once and for all, the Man of Steel returns after a long absence to a much-changed world. Lois Lane has moved on with her life, and society has learned to survive without him. Superman must find a way to reconnect with her and find his place in a world that may no longer need him.

programme.title: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Lara Croft is the fiercely independent daughter of an eccentric adventurer who vanished years earlier. Hoping to solve the mystery of her father's disappearance, Croft embarks on a perilous journey to his last-known destination -- a fabled tomb on a mythical island that might be somewhere off the coast of Japan. The stakes couldn't be higher as Lara must rely on her sharp mind, blind faith and stu

programme.title: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Mel Gibson) and his estranged daughter (Erin Moriarty) go on the run from her drug-dealing boyfriend (Diego Luna) and his vicious cartel.

programme.title: Red Sparrow
programme.desc: Prima ballerina Dominika Egorova faces a bleak and uncertain future after she suffers an injury that ends her career. She soon turns to Sparrow School, a secret intelligence service that trains exceptional young people to use their minds and bodies as weapons. Egorova emerges as the most dangerous Sparrow after completing the sadistic training process. As she comes to terms with her new abilities,

programme.title: This Is Not a War Story
programme.desc: Some veterans take part in an unusual art project designed to help them deal with the leftover trauma associated with their combat experiences.

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Chief Warrant Officer Roy Miller and his team of inspectors are on a mission in 2003 to find Iraq's reported stockpiles of weapons of mass destruction. Traveling from one dangerous site to another, Miller and his team fail to find any chemical agents or other weapons. Instead, they discover an elaborate coverup in which the most-elusive weapon is truth.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when the Flash uses his superpowers to travel back in time to change the events of the past. However, when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, he becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation. With no other superheroes to turn to, the Flash looks to coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imp

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, special operatives Valerian and Laureline work together to maintain order throughout the human territories. Under assignment from the minister of defense, the duo embarks on a mission to Alpha, an ever-expanding metropolis where diverse species gather to share knowledge and culture. When a dark force threatens the peaceful city, Valerian and Laureline must race against time to

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: Aspiring actor Edward undergoes a radical medical procedure to drastically transform his appearance. But his new dream face turns into a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

programme.title: Beirut
programme.desc: In the 1980s Beirut, Mason Skiles is a former U.S. diplomat who is called back into service to save a colleague from the group that is possibly responsible for his own family's death. Meanwhile, a CIA field agent who is working undercover at the American embassy is tasked with keeping Mason alive and ensuring that the mission is a success.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.title: Elevation
programme.desc: Post-apocalyptic survivors find refuge in the Rocky Mountains to hide from giant, insect-like creatures that can't live above 8,000 feet. However, when one of them needs life-saving supplies, they risk it all to venture into the danger zone.

programme.title: The Mountain Between Us
programme.desc: Stranded on a mountain after a tragic plane crash, two strangers must work together to endure the extreme elements of the remote, snow-covered terrain. Realizing that help is not on the way, they embark on a perilous journey across hundreds of miles of wilderness, pushing each other to survive and discovering their inner strength.

programme.title: Alex Cross
programme.desc: Alex Cross (Tyler Perry) works as a detective/psychologist for the Detroit Police Department along with his lifelong friend, Tommy Kane (Edward Burns), and detective Monica Ashe (Rachel Nichols). Cross' latest case puts him on a collision course with Picasso (Matthew Fox), a cunning serial killer whose ultimate target is multinational industrialist Giles Mercier (Jean Reno). Cross must find a way

programme.title: All the President's Men
programme.desc: Two green reporters and rivals working for the Washington Post, Bob Woodward (Robert Redford) and Carl Bernstein (Dustin Hoffman), research the botched 1972 burglary of the Democratic Party Headquarters at the Watergate apartment complex. With the help of a mysterious source, code-named Deep Throat (Hal Holbrook), the two reporters make a connection between the burglars and a White House staffer.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: A Natural History
programme.desc: Delving into the mythological, including dragons, mermaids, and unicorns -- alongside examinations of natural world beasts, such as vervet monkeys, narwhals, and manatees; Stephen Fry travels far and wide to learn about such animals.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After the highs of winning the world championships, the Bellas find themselves split apart and discovering there aren't job prospects for making music with your mouth. But when they get the chance to reunite for an overseas USO tour, the group of nerds comes together to make some music one last time.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Greta Gerwig's Oscar-winning period drama adaptation of the classic Louisa May Alcott novel, starring Emma Watson, Saoirse Ronan, Florence Pugh, Timothée Chalamet and Meryl Streep.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Ride Lonesome
programme.desc: Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

programme.title: Enemy Mine
programme.desc: Sci-fi adventure starring Dennis Quaid and Louis Gossett Jr. A human and his alien enemy find themselves stranded alone on a hostile planet, where they must work together to survive.

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen
programme.desc: Fantasy with Sean Connery. In an alternative Victorian age, can Allan Quatermain, Dorian Gray, Captain Nemo, Mina Harker and the Invisible Man avert a war.

programme.title: How to Have Sex
programme.desc: Incisive coming-of-age drama with Mia McKenna-Bruce. Three teenage girls go on holiday looking for a taste of hedonism. But is the reality as simple or as fun as the dream.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Part four of the Tom Cruise action-thriller franchise. The Impossible Missions Force fight to clear their name, while also trying to avert nuclear war. Busy, busy, busy.

programme.title: Old Boys
programme.desc: Charming comedy set in an all-boys school in the 80s. An awkward geek gets caught in a love triangle with a teacher's daughter and the school sports star.

programme.title: Twelve O'Clock High
programme.desc: World War II drama starring Gregory Peck as a US general who must treat a demoralised bomber squadron severely to restore discipline. With Oscar-winning support from Dean Jagger.

programme.title: The Black Shield of Falworth
programme.desc: Medieval action-adventure starring Tony Curtis and Janet Leigh. When a peasant discovers his true lineage, he sets out to woo his noble sweetheart and avenge his father's murder.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: Civil War-era western starring John Wayne and Rock Hudson. Union and Confederate soldiers reluctantly join forces to fight against Mexican Emperor Maximillian's invasion.

programme.title: Le Mans '66
programme.desc: Oscar-winning sports drama starring Matt Damon and Christian Bale. In the 60s, Ford set out to build a car that can defeat Ferrari at the 24 Hours of Le Mans race.

programme.title: Midnight Run
programme.desc: Action comedy. Robert De Niro stars as a bounty hunter transporting a criminal from New York to Los Angeles with the FBI and the mob hot on their tail. With Charles Grodin.

programme.title: Warlock
programme.desc: Fantasy horror with Julian Sands and Richard E Grant. Using magic, an evil warlock flees to 80s LA from the olde-worlde. Can he unmake creation before a witch-finder tracks him down.

programme.title: You Again
programme.desc: Marni is shocked to learn that her brother is marrying her school bully from the past. When she tries to expose her, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: When a lively young family moves in next door, grumpy widower Otto Anderson meets his match in a quick-witted, pregnant woman named Marisol, leading to an unlikely friendship that turns his world upside down.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: When a lively young family moves in next door, grumpy widower Otto Anderson meets his match in a quick-witted, pregnant woman named Marisol, leading to an unlikely friendship that turns his world upside down.

programme.title: Wicked Little Letters
programme.desc: When residents begin to receive wicked letters full of hilarious profanities, foul-mouthed Rose is charged with the crime. However, as the town's women investigate, they suspect that something is amiss, and that Rose may not be the culprit after all.

programme.title: The French Dispatch
programme.desc: A love letter to journalists set in an outpost of an American newspaper in a fictional 20th-century French city that brings to life a collection of stories published in "The French Dispatch.".

programme.title: Moulin Rouge
programme.desc: A celebration of love and creative inspiration takes place in the infamous, gaudy and glamorous Parisian nightclub, at the cusp of the 20th century. programme.title: Love Me
programme.desc: A buoy and a satellite meet online long after humanity's extinction. As they learn what life was like on Earth, they discover themselves and what it means to be alive and in love.

programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

Hays Hodges (Tommy Lee Jones), a comrade-in-arms who owes his life to Childers.

Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips.

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite
programme.desc: A socially inept high-school student and his lonely unemployed brother find their eccentric home life thrown into upheaval when their meddling uncle comes to stay. The teenage oddball tries to make the best of his changing circumstances, while putting all his skills to the task of helping his new best friend win the class presidency. Comedy, starring Jon Heder, Efren Ramirez and Haylie Duff.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: A married couple decide to put some passion back into their dull marriage by filming themselves having sex. However, a technological mix-up results in the footage being uploaded to various gadgets, and they race against time to recover all the copies before it ends up in the public eye. Comedy, starring Cameron Diaz and Jason Segel.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: Recently widowed Bridget enters the dating game once again, caught between her son's science teacher and a man 20 years her junior. Romantic comedy, starring Renee Zellweger, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Hugh Grant, Leo Woodall and Colin Firth.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Roman

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Care

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon pretends to be unhappily married to seduce women. When his girlfriend finds his prop wedding ring, he claims he is getting a divorce and has to persuade his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife, but is forced to come up with yet more lies to maintain the illusion. Romantic comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Jennifer Aniston and Nicole Kidman.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: Office worker Craig Waterman meets Austin Carmichael, a local TV weatherman who has not made any friends yet and possesses the natural easy-going charm that Craig so obviously lacks. The men become mainstays in each other's lives, but Craig is ill-equipped for polite social interactions and his behaviour becomes increasingly unhinged. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Kate Mara and Tim Robinson.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: A tough detective is forced to pose as a preschool teacher in a bid to capture a drug dealer whose son is one of the pupils. However, his biggest challenge turns out to be controlling a class full of five-year-olds. Comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Penelope Ann Miller, Linda Hunt, Pamela Reed and Richard Tyson.

programme.title: Coyotes
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: A woman more interested in one-night stands than true love is forced to reassess her priorities after meeting the man of her dreams. However, when she hears he is getting married, she sets out on a hectic road trip across America to stop the wedding. Romantic comedy, starring Cameron Diaz, Christina Applegate, Selma Blair and Thomas Jane.

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite
programme.desc: A socially inept high-school student and his lonely unemployed brother find their eccentric home life thrown into upheaval when their meddling uncle comes to stay. The teenage oddball tries to make the best of his changing circumstances, while putting all his skills to the task of helping his new best friend win the class presidency. Comedy, starring Jon Heder, Efren Ramirez and Haylie Duff.

programme.title: Poison
programme.desc: Dive into the love story of a couple who reunited many years after a tragedy drove them apart. Tim Roth and Trine Dyrholm star.

programme.title: Uproar
programme.desc: A 17-year-old student is forced to get off the fence and stand up for himself, his family and his future in this heartwarming story of identity. Starring Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Girl You Know It's True
programme.desc: Biographical music drama exploring the notorious scandal involving 80s dancers Robert Pilatus and Fabrice Morvan's rise to fame.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: Elizabeth Banks stars as a talented surgeon whose life unravels after an inexperienced colleague makes a fatal mistake. Tense medical drama.

programme.title: Oslo
programme.desc: Adapted from the Tony Award-winning play of the same name, Oslo recounts the true-life story of an attempt to broker peace between Israel and Palestine. Andrew Scott stars.

programme.title: Uproar
programme.desc: A 17-year-old student is forced to get off the fence and stand up for himself, his family and his future in this heartwarming story of identity. Starring Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Joker: Folie A Deux
programme.desc: Joaquin Phoenix returns to his Oscar-winning role, as an incarcerated Arthur Fleck meets his true love: Lady Gaga's Harley Quinn.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An actor undergoes a medical procedure to transform his appearance, but his new dream face quickly turns into a nightmare. Oscar-nominated drama with Sebastian Stan.

programme.title: The Post
programme.desc: Publisher Katharine and her editor-in-chief Ben put their careers and freedom at risk to uncover a scandalous decades-long secret about the Vietnam War.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: On learning he can time travel, Domhnall Gleeson tries to engineer the perfect relationship with Rachel McAdams. Romance from Richard Curtis. Strong language/sex/nudity.

programme.title: Ferrari
programme.desc: Ex-Formula 1 racer Enzo Ferrari launches his team into the perilous 1,000-mile Mille Miglia race. Sky Original film from Michael Mann with Adam Driver and Penélope Cruz.

programme.title: Girl You Know It's True
programme.desc: Biographical music drama exploring the notorious scandal involving 80s dancers Robert Pilatus and Fabrice Morvan's rise to fame.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: Elizabeth Banks stars as a talented surgeon whose life unravels after an inexperienced colleague makes a fatal mistake. Tense medical drama.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: Grammy-nominated musician Brinsley Forde stars as Blue, a young reggae DJ chasing his musical ambitions while battling racism in Thatcher-era South London.

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: Powerful drama about a troubled Brooklyn teen aimlessly drifting through summer while struggling to come to terms with his own desires. From Sundance winner Eliza Hittman.

programme.title: The United States Vs. Billie Holiday
programme.desc: Andra Day stars in her Oscar-nominated, Golden Globe-winning role as Billie Holiday. Biographical drama.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Welsh chicken factory worker Helen's life is a grind, until she gets a second chance at love. Heartwarming musical-drama starring Louise Brealey.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An actor undergoes a medical procedure to transform his appearance, but his new dream face quickly turns into a nightmare. Oscar-nominated drama with Sebastian Stan.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: On learning he can time travel, Domhnall Gleeson tries to engineer the perfect relationship with Rachel McAdams. Romance from Richard Curtis. Strong language/sex/nudity.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles are back battling bad guys when Shredder busts out of custody and teams up with Krang.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! To The Movies
programme.desc: Join the Teen Titans on a Hollywood adventure as they fulfil their dream of starring in their very own superhero movie. With Kristen Bell and Will Arnett.

programme.title: Scarygirl
programme.desc: When her world is shrouded in darkness, a young girl must travel to the mysterious city of light. Animated fantastical adventure. Mature themes/flashing images.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: Jason Issacs plays Hook in this captivating adaptation of the classic tale. Rachel Hurd-Wood plays Wendy, who is whisked away to Neverland by the Lost Boys. Flashing images.(109mins).

programme.title: Flavia
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old amateur sleuth Flavia de Luce investigates a murder at her family's manor when her father falls under suspicion. Starring Martin Freeman and Jonathan Pryce.

programme.title: Extinct
programme.desc: Two extinct Flummels (fluffy, rabbit-like creatures) are transported from 1835 to modern-day Shanghai. Animated fun.

programme.title: Antz
programme.desc: Woody Allen leads the voice cast as a worker ant desperate to escape colony conformity and woo the beautiful princess. Sharon Stone also voices this animated adventure.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: When their rivalry leaves them cast adrift on the streets of New York, two squabbling mutts must put their differences aside. Animated adventure.

programme.title: The Secret Life Of Pets 2
programme.desc: Sequel to the hit film about the adventures of our pets that we don't see when we leave home. With the voices of Kevin Hart and Harrison Ford.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship holds the key to Vikings and dragons forging a new future together as an ancient threat rears its head.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Struggling to find his inner meh, multi-expressional livewire Gene embarks on a daring app-venture to find notorious hacker Jailbreak. Animation.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: Classic animated adventure with grumpy ogre Mike Myers setting out to rescue feisty princess Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: It's time for odorous ogre Mike Myers to meet the new in-laws with his princess bride Cameron Diaz. Animated antics with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Eddie Murphy.(89mins).

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A young mystic must learn to control the elements to save his kingdom from a destructive war. Action-packed adaptation of the hit animation. Moderate violence.

programme.title: Penguins Of Madagascar
programme.desc: A group of wisecracking penguins join forces with an undercover organisation to stop a dastardly villain. Animated adventure with the voice of Benedict Cumberbatch.

programme.title: The Tiger Rising
programme.desc: When a boy discovers a caged tiger near his home, his imagination runs wild. Heart-warming family film with Queen Latifah. Contains some upsetting scenes.

programme.title: Pets On A Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist.

programme.title: Penguins Of Madagascar
programme.desc: A group of wisecracking penguins join forces with an undercover organisation to stop a dastardly villain. Animated adventure with the voice of Benedict Cumberbatch.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: A pair of fuzzy-headed trolls embark on a daring rescue mission when members of their tribe are kidnapped. Animation with the voices of Anna Kendrick and Justin Timberlake.

programme.title: Johnny Mnemonic
programme.desc: Cyberpunk action following a data courier who has just days to save his own life from a deadly implant. Keanu Reeves and Dolph Lundgren star. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Fred Ward play handymen working in a desolate desert town which is invaded by giant, underground worms. Cult classic spoof of 1950s monster movies.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Unmissable...
programme.desc: Dive into a world of unmissable Sky Original films, from psychological thriller To Catch a Killer to the Oscar-nominated The Unites States vs Billie Holiday.

programme.title: An Officer And A Gentleman
programme.desc: Classic romantic drama starring Richard Gere as a troubled trainee naval officer who falls for Debra Winger's sassy factory girl. Strong language/moderate sex and nudity.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own
programme.desc: In WWII, while the men are on the battlefield, the women are on the playing field. Tom Hanks and Madonna star in a feelgood baseball tale.

programme.title: Legends Of The Fall
programme.desc: Epic drama following the lives of three frontier brothers as they experience love, loss, war and betrayal. With Brad Pitt. Strong language/violence/sex/flashing images.(128mins).

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: Villains Jim Carrey and Tommy Lee Jones pose a deadly riddle for caped crusader Val Kilmer. Moderate violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Batman & Robin
programme.desc: George Clooney and Chris O'Donnell must save Gotham City from evil genius Arnold Schwarzenegger and green-fingered Uma Thurman. Flashing images.(119mins).

programme.title: Enter The Dragon
programme.desc: Bruce Lee is the martial artist competing with international bruisers and cracking an opium racket in his spare time. Classic action. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: Stanley Kubrick's iconic Vietnam drama sees Matthew Modine dehumanised by training then thrown into the horror of war. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: Paul Newman is unforgettable as the defiant Deep South chain-gang prisoner whose rebellion makes him a hero with fellow inmates. An Oscar-winning George Kennedy co-stars.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Megastar singer Whitney Houston hires bodyguard Kevin Costner to protect her from a stalker. Oscar-nominated romantic drama.

programme.title: An Officer And A Gentleman
programme.desc: Classic romantic drama starring Richard Gere as a troubled trainee naval officer who falls for Debra Winger's sassy factory girl. Strong language/moderate sex and nudity.

programme.desc: Epic drama following the lives of three frontier brothers as they experience love, loss, war and betrayal. With Brad Pitt. Strong language/violence/sex/flashing images.(128mins).

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Wild-eyed Brooklyn bank robbers Al Pacino and John Cazale are forced to take hostages after a bungled heist. Oscar-winning crime drama. Contains strong language.

programme.title: The Hunt For Red October
programme.desc: Soviet nuclear sub commander Sean Connery announces his defection to the West, but is it just a war-mongering ploy? Thriller with Alec Baldwin.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood is Harry Callahan, a maverick San Francisco cop out to trap a deranged killer known as Scorpio. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to live with his father in Tokyo after a brush with the law, but soon becomes involved in illegal street racing. When he ends up owing money to gangsters after losing a race against a driver with Yakuza connections, he has to learn to master the Japanese style of driving to win and pay back his debts. Action adventure, starring Lucas Black, Nathalie Kelley and Bow Wow.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview - May 2026
programme.desc: A look ahead at the films to enjoy this month on Sky Cinema.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: News of a friend's murder brings international fugitive Dominic Toretto back to his home city of Los Angeles in search of revenge. It is not long before his pursuit leads him to cross paths with FBI agent Brian O'Conner, and despite their hostile feelings toward each other, the pair work together to bring down those responsible. Thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBI's top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: A gang of fugitives is reunited by an FBI manhunter, who offers the criminals pardons in return for their help. They must go to Europe and bring down a criminal syndicate led by a ruthless London gangster, whose right-hand woman is an old friend of theirs assumed to be dead. Action thriller sequel, with Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson and Michelle Rodriguez.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating Owen Shaw and his crew and securing amnesty for their past crimes, Dom, Brian and the rest of the team return home to live normal lives again. However Shaw's older brother Deckard - a rogue special forces assassin vows revenge on Dom, who he holds responsible for leaving Owen in a coma. Action thriller sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Jason Statham and Paul Walker in his last film role

programme.title: Fast & Furious 8
programme.desc: Street racing criminal Dominic Toretto is drawn out of retirement by an encounter with a ruthless cyberterrorist, who recruits him for an international criminal scheme. As he sets out to steal the technology she needs to unleash chaos on the world, he is drawn into conflict with both old enemies and his former gang. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Charlize Theron, Dwayne Johnson and

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: In a move to identify suspected hijackers, an undercover police officer infiltrates the high-octane world of illegal late-night street racing by rival gangs. He is befriended by a champion driver, but when he also forms a bond with the racer's sister, he is pitched into a conflict of loyalties. Thriller, starring Vin Diesel, Paul Walker, Michelle Rodriguez and Jordana Brewster.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: A disgraced former cop is arrested by the FBI for illegal street racing, but his one-time colleagues offer him freedom in exchange for going on an undercover mission. Teaming up with an old racing friend and a customs official, he has to infiltrate and bring down a drug-trafficking operation. Thriller sequel, with Paul Walker reprising his role from The Fast and the Furious alongside Tyrese Gibson

programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls for a woman from a wealthy 18th-century family. Language/sex/mature themes/flashing images.

programme.desc: In 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: The story of Lorenz Hart's struggles with alcoholism and mental health as he tries to save face during the opening of Oklahoma. Starring Ethan Hawke and Bobby Cannavale.

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programme.desc: Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie meet at a wedding and relive moments from their pasts, illuminating the path that led them here.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one last terrifying case involving mysterious entities they must confront.

programme.title: Timestalker
programme.desc: Hapless Agnes continues to make the same fatal mistake - falling for the wrong guy and dying gruesomely. Can she break the cycle? Twisted romcom.

programme.title: There's Something In The Barn
programme.desc: An American family inherits a remote cabin in the mountains of Norway, but they get more than they bargained for when they encounter a strange creature. Comedy horror.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Jurassic
programme.desc: Welcome to a Cinema List 65 million years in the making, going through the very best moments from the Jurassic franchise - from the 1993 original to Jurassic World: Dominion.

programme.title: Xeno
programme.desc: A young girl and a terrifying alien form a powerful bond after a chance encounter in the desert, sending them on an adventure that questions the nature of good and evil.

programme.title: It Feeds
programme.desc: A clairvoyant therapist confronts her own personal demons while trying to save a young girl who believes a malevolent entity is feeding on her.

programme.title: Paycheck
programme.desc: Ben Affleck sells three years of his memory, but on payday there's no cash and he's wanted for murder. Sci-fi based on a story by Philip K Dick. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: Colossal manpowered robots clash with gigantic aliens in a supersized battle for Earth. Brilliant sci-fi action from Guillermo Del Toro.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: Epic action as Navy scrappers Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Alexander Skarsgard face an alien armada. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Mars Attacks!
programme.desc: Martian invaders zap Jack Nicholson, Glenn Close, Pierce Brosnan and Tom Jones in Tim Burton's barmy sci-fi romp. Contains violence & flashing images.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: Crazed hunter Jon Voight puts a film crew in grave danger as he obsessively tracks the world's largest snake. Tense creature feature starring Jennifer Lopez and Ice Cube.

programme.title: The Shining
programme.desc: Caretaking a remote hotel, writer Jack Nicholson slowly succumbs to murderous insanity. Stanley Kubrick directs this unsettling horror classic. Contains violent scenes.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Stylish action with Wesley Snipes as a half-human half-vampire hero on a mission to destroy the vampire underworld.

programme.title: Blade II
programme.desc: Wesley Snipes returns as the human-vampire hybrid, forced to work with unexpected allies to battle a genocidal group of mutants.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: In an oppressive future society, a wrongly convicted prisoner is forced to participate in a deadly gameshow. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Restore Point
programme.desc: In 2041, a detective investigates a murder case after a scientific breakthrough revives the victim. Czech sci-fi.

programme.title: Lovely, Dark, And Deep
programme.desc: A new back-country ranger travels alone through the dangerous wilderness, hoping to uncover the origins of a tragedy that has haunted her since childhood.

programme.title: Man Finds Tape
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Found-footage horror. Language/violence.

programme.title: The Lost Boys
programme.desc: In a town troubled by bloodsuckers, Corey Haim's brother starts behaving like a vamp, so he sets out to take down Kiefer Sutherland. Flashing images.

programme.title: Risky Business
programme.desc: A young Tom Cruise slides his way into trouble as the unruly teen cutting loose when his parents leave town. Iconic eighties fun. Strong language/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: Peggy faints and wakes up to find herself back in 1960, leading her to try to spot and correct the mistakes that led to disappointments and an unhappy marriage.

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: Miniaturised pilot Dennis Quaid is trapped inside Martin Short's bloodstream when an experiment goes awry. Meg Ryan co-stars in a comedy with real chemistry.

programme.title: The Last Starfighter
programme.desc: A video game expert finds himself transported to another planet after conquering a game, only to discover it was just a test. Classic sci-fi action adventure.

programme.title: Batteries Not Included
programme.desc: Aliens help a feisty old New York couple in their battle against the ruthless land developer who's out to evict them and their tenants. Sci-fi comedy with Hume Cronyn.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: New kid Daniel stands up to his bullies with the help of karate master Mr Miyagi in this family favourite. Starring Ralph Macchio and Pat Morita.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: High-kicking karate student Daniel and his mentor Mr Miyagi travel to Japan to settle an old score. Family action sequel with Pat Morita and Ralph Macchio.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III
programme.desc: Hothead Daniel dumps Mr Miyagi for a new coach. But without his ally, can the youngster defeat the toxic waste baron who is training an old enemy? Mild violence.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: Streetwise Detroit detective Eddie Murphy pursues a colleague's killer to LA, causing mayhem for local cop Judge Reinhold. Action comedy.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: Motor-mouthed cop Axel Foley (Eddie Murphy) returns to LA to solve the 'alphabet robberies' that have been baffling local police. Action comedy.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: Veteran cop Danny Glover and maverick Mel Gibson team up to thwart drug-smugglers. Strong language/violence/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Scarface
programme.desc: Ultraviolent gangster epic from Brian De Palma. Al Pacino is the ambitious Cuban immigrant who builds a drug empire. Strong language/violence/drugs/flashing images.

programme.title: Empire Of The Sun
programme.desc: Spoilt youngster Christian Bale fights to survive a Japanese POW camp alongside American scrounger John Malkovich. Epic WWII drama from Steven Spielberg.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: Allied POWs are ready for a soccer match versus Germany in Nazi Paris, while French Resistance and British officers plot the team's daring escape to freedom.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: When the police force relaxes its recruitment criteria, Steve Guttenberg and Kim Cattrall are among a gaggle of incompetent oddballs who apply to become cops. Goofy comedy.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: The gang stumble through their first task after graduating, battling graffiti artists who have moved into town. Strong language/flashing images.

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Funding is cut and one of the city's academies must close, but which one? Let battle commence! More hijinks with the calamitous cops. Flashing images.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: Streetwise Detroit detective Eddie Murphy pursues a colleague's killer to LA, causing mayhem for local cop Judge Reinhold. Action comedy.

programme.title: Juror #2
programme.desc: While serving as a juror in a high-profile murder case, family man Nicholas Hoult grapples with a serious moral dilemma. From Clint Eastwood.

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a nightmare when an American family stay at a British couple's idyllic estate. Horror with James McAvoy.

programme.title: Murder By Numbers
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock is the seasoned cop on the trail of the privileged high-schoolers who think they've committed the perfect crime. Psychological thriller with Ryan Gosling.

programme.title: Ocean's 8
programme.desc: After getting out of prison, Debbie Ocean plots to steal a priceless necklace from New York's Met Gala. Heist caper with Sandra Bullock.

programme.title: The Hunt For Red October
programme.desc: Soviet nuclear sub commander Sean Connery announces his defection to the West, but is it just a war-mongering ploy? Thriller with Alec Baldwin.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: Tom Hanks stars as the captain of a container ship that is hijacked by Somali pirates in this Oscar-nominated thriller. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: The latest mystery thriller by M Night Shyamalan sees a father and his teen daughter attend a deadly pop concert. With Josh Harnett.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays a man with amnesia who finds himself at the centre of a manhunt. First-rate action thriller. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: Matt Damon returns as the amnesiac assassin, forced to abandon his quiet new life when he's framed for murder. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Amnesiac ex-assassin Jason Bourne tracks down the spooks responsible for turning him into a killer.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins returns as cannibal serial killer Dr Lecter, now at large but hunted by a mutilated former victim. Thriller with Julianne Moore. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Golden Globe winner Robert Downey Jr is the eponymous sleuth and Jude Law his sidekick Watson in Guy Ritchie's barnstorming take on the legendary detective. Violence.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game Of Shadows
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr and Jude Law return as the shrewd detective and his trusty aide Watson, taking on arch-nemesis Moriarty in a battle of wits. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Amnesiac ex-assassin Jason Bourne tracks down the spooks responsible for turning him into a killer.

programme.title: My Teacher's Wife
programme.desc: A high-school student (Jason London) struggling with calculus falls for his tutor (Tia Carrere), who happens to be his math teacher's wife (Christopher McDonald).

programme.title: House of D
programme.desc: In the present, artist Tom Warshaw (David Duchovny) recalls his traumatic coming of age. As a 13-year-old (Anton Yelchin) growing up in New York City in 1973, Tom hangs out with Pappass (Robin Williams), a mentally disabled man. With Tom's mother (Téa Leoni) battling depression after the death of her husband, the young boy is left to his own devices. When Tom develops a crush on schoolmate Melissa

programme.title: I Wish You All the Best
programme.desc: A high school junior comes out as nonbinary and is thrown out of their family's home. With nowhere else to turn, they move in with their estranged older sister and her husband. After enrolling in a new school, they find support from an eccentric art teacher and form an unexpected bond with a kindhearted student.

programme.title: Demoted
programme.desc: Two prankster tire salesmen are forced to become secretaries after their long-suffering boss finally gets tired of their antics.

programme.title: Out on Parole
programme.desc: An ex-con may miss a crucial meeting with his parole officer if he enters a low-rider contest to save his mother's home.

programme.title: The Outside Story
programme.desc: An introverted video editor locks himself out of his building and is forced to confront the world he has been avoiding in search of a way back inside.

programme.title: The Rules of Attraction
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Bret Easton Ellis, "Rules" centers around Patrick Bateman's younger brother and his college friends' bizarre mating rituals that mix sex, drugs, music and mayhem in a kaleidoscopic story about three students entangled in a curiously surreal romantic triangle...

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: NASCAR superstar Ricky Bobby is at the top of his game; adored by fans, a trophy wife by his side, and incredible wealth. But Ricky loses it all when French Formula One champion Jean Girard roars onto the scene. Ricky, with the help of his ruthless father, must pull himself out of the depths of despair and restore his honor on the racetrack.

programme.title: Step Brothers
programme.desc: Brennan Huff (Will Ferrell) and Dale Doback (John C. Reilly) have one thing in common: they are both lazy, unemployed leeches who still live with their parents. When Brennan's mother and Dale's father marry and move in together, it turns the overgrown boys' world upside down. Their insane rivalry and narcissism pull the new family apart, forcing them to work together to reunite their parents.

programme.title: Woo
programme.desc: Woo (Jada Pinkett Smith) is a woman in control of her world. She is smart, self-confident, sophisticated and snarky. And she doesn't have any trouble attracting members of the opposite sex. But for some reason no one ever sticks around. Woo meets Tim (Tommy Davidson), a paralegal who is her complete opposite. They shouldn't click. However, Woo and Tim begin to bond when a series of weird and stres

programme.title: Joyride
programme.desc: Three excitement-craving friends get more than they bargained for when they steal a hit woman's automobile.

programme.title: Most Likely to Murder
programme.desc: When Billy, the coolest kid in high school, comes back to his hometown 15 years later to find he's no longer cool and the girl he still has feelings for now dates the former town outcast, he sets out to prove that his rival is actually a murderer.

programme.title: High School

Since he'll lose his college scholarship if he fails the drug test, Henry forms a half-baked plan. Though usually unlucky in love, he begins a tentative relationship with a music-loving schoolteacher (Bonnie Hunt), but what really gives him a new sense of purpose is the revelation that his favorite film, "Marty," is being remade.

programme.title: Knights of Badassdom
programme.desc: Three best friends (Peter Dinklage, Ryan Kwanten, Steve Zahn) must find a way to vanquish the evil entity they summoned during a live-action role-playing game.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: Prompted by her popular best friend to spill details of her boring weekend, Olive, a clean-cut teen, decides to spice things up by telling a little lie about losing her virginity; when the high-school busybody overhears the conversation and spreads it all over campus, Olive is suddenly notorious but for the wrong reasons.

programme.title: This Means War
programme.desc: CIA operatives FDR Foster (Chris Pine) and Tuck (Tom Hardy) are inseparable best friends and partners. Together, their good looks, covert abilities and combat skills rank them among the CIA's elite, but their longstanding personal and professional bond is put to the test when they meet Lauren (Reese Witherspoon). programme.title: My Blueberry Nights

programme.desc: The son (Christian Slater) of a former NASA scientist (Robert Foxworth) befriends a fallen astronaut (Martin Sheen) changed for life by his moonwalk.

programme.title: Night Train to Lisbon
programme.desc: Swiss professor Raimund Gregorius abandons his life to embark on a thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Marshall

programme.title: Macbeth

programme.title: Lovely & Amazing

programme.title: The Blood Oranges

programme.desc: The rural town of New Hope, Ala., has a pair of super-sized problems heading its way: There's a hurricane bearing down on the Gulf coastline, and there's a team of 30 well-armed mercenaries intent on looting the local treasury facility.

programme.title: Dìdi
